title: Combining the summary subitems timeline and the parent timeline columns
excerpt: Hi - I am sharing out boards to executives and they do not need to see the Add Item or Add Subitem.  Please add a feature to allow this.

posts.author: SSplaycore (Sheila Shah)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi - I am sharing out boards to executives and they do not need to see the Add Item or Add Subitem. Please add a feature to allow this.
